prompt:
A FieldServe Service Marketplace management system that includes a role-based portal for Administrators, Service Providers, and Customers to discover and manage local services entirely offline. The React web interface provides a service catalog with hierarchical categories and a controlled tag taxonomy so users can browse by trade (e.g., HVAC, tutoring, personal training) and refine results with multi-field search, fuzzy matching, and multidimensional filters for keyword, price range in USD, service area radius in miles, availability dates, and rating, with sorting by newest, price, distance, or popularity and paginated results that respond within 300 ms for cached queries. Users can save favorites, compare up to 3 services side-by-side, and access search history plus trending recommendations based on locally aggregated activity. Customers can submit an “interest” to a provider, follow the intent status from submitted to accepted or declined, and receive read receipts for in-app messages to support a closed loop from discovery to engagement. To prevent spam and bad-faith activity, the UI enforces duplicate-submission limits of 1 active interest per customer per provider within 7 days, provides clear inline validation and error feedback, and supports blocking so either side can blacklist the other, immediately hiding profiles and stopping further messages while retaining prior records for compliance review.

The backend uses Go with Echo to expose REST-style APIs consumed by the decoupled React frontend, performing authentication, validation, and persistence in PostgreSQL for services, categories, tags, search indexes, interests, messages, favorites, and operational metrics. The search and filtering engine supports configurable autocomplete and hot-keywords stored locally, plus query-result caching with a 10-minute TTL and LRU eviction to keep performance stable offline. Audit Logs & Security Controls capture all key operations such as logins, permission changes, service publishing, data exports, and API access, with immutable append-only storage and daily rotation; sensitive fields display masked in the UI and are encrypted at rest using AES-256 for items like phone numbers and notes. Privilege-escalation detection flags attempts where a user tries to access admin-only endpoints, triggers throttling at 60 requests per minute per account, and blocks duplicate form submissions by idempotency tokens valid for 5 minutes. File uploads for provider documents are validated locally by allowlisted MIME type and extension, a 10 MB size cap, and checksum-based fingerprinting to detect tampering; executable formats are rejected outright. Data analytics and operations reporting provides admin-only dashboards for user growth, conversion from search to interest submission, and provider utilization with time-window filters and CSV export to a local file, while access control ensures only Administrators can export and all exports are logged. An Alert Center and tiered response workflow runs on scheduled jobs in the same offline environment, evaluating configurable thresholds and quiet hours, assigning severity, escalating to on-call roles inside the app, and tracking work orders from dispatch through resolution and post-incident review with SLA timers and evidence retention for 180 days. stack: Frontend

Framework: React

Architecture: Decoupled, Role-based portals

Features: Multi-field search, fuzzy matching, side-by-side comparison, pagination, offline-first local aggregation

Backend

Language: Go (Golang)

Web Framework: Echo (REST-style APIs)

Environment: Entirely Offline/Local

Storage & Persistence

Database: PostgreSQL (Relational data & search indexes)

Caching: Local query-result caching (LRU eviction, 10-minute TTL)

File Storage: Local storage with MIME/Checksum validation

Logging: Immutable append-only Audit Logs (Daily rotation)

Security & Compliance

Encryption: AES-256 (At-rest for sensitive fields)

Auth: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) with privilege-escalation detection

Rate Limiting: 60 RPM per account / Idempotency tokens (5-minute TTL)

Data Integrity: Masked UI fields, checksum-based fingerprinting, blocking/blacklisting mechanics

Business Logic & Ops

Search Engine: Custom multi-dimensional filtering & autocomplete

Messaging: In-app with read receipts

Analytics: Admin Dashboards (User growth, conversion, utilization)

Job Engine: Scheduled offline tasks for Alert Center & SLA tracking
